text:
return
            (success_ &&
                chainType_ == 0x0000 &&
                chainReference_.length < 33 &&
                (addr_.length == 0 || addr_.length == 20))
                ? (
                    true,
                    uint256(bytes32(chainReference_)) >> (256 - 8 * chainReference_.length),
                    address(bytes20(addr_))
                )
                : (false, 0, address(0));
